PSA Population Report Changes — May 2026

Published: May 1, 2026

The PSA population reports show significant changes in the ratio of PSA 10 to PSA 9 grades for modern sports cards released in 2024-2025.

For Pokemon, the PSA 10 rate on modern V cards has dropped from 12% to 8% following the introduction of textured holofoil in early 2024.

For sports, basketball rookie cards from the 2024 class show a PSA 10 rate of approximately 15%, consistent with 2023 figures.

"Population data is one of the most underutilized tools in the secondary market." — Market analyst

For more information visit PSA Card.
